summary: Frontend testing of multi-lot operation grouping (operation_id) feature. Dashboard correctly shows grouped operations (1 row per operation_id). Login, session persistence, mobile sidebar, and all core pages work. Confirmed critical bug: transfer edit mode does NOT load all lots of a multi-lot operation (transfer_page.py ignores edit_transfer_op_id). Insemination edit mode correctly loads all lots via operation_id.

ui_bugs.issue: When editing a multi-lot transfer from the dashboard logs modal, transfer_page.py completely ignores st.session_state['edit_transfer_op_id']. Only the single clicked row's lot is pre-filled, not all N lots of the grouped operation. The session key edit_transfer_op_id is set by dashboard_page.py but never read in transfer_page.py.

integration_issues.issue: transfer_page.py does not query all lots by operation_id when edit_transfer_op_id is set. Only uses edit_transfer_id (single action row). For a 6-lot grouped transfer, only 1 lot is pre-filled instead of 6.

issues: Multiple 'Invalid color passed for widgetBackgroundColor/widgetBorderColor/skeletonBackgroundColor in theme.sidebar' warnings - CSS theme misconfiguration (non-critical, cosmetic)
Vega-Lite version mismatch warnings v5.20.1 vs v6.3.1 in charts - non-critical
Vega-Lite 'Infinite extent for Palhetas_start/end' when no data - chart handles gracefully

action_items: FIX (HIGH): In transfer_page.py, implement edit_transfer_op_id handling similar to insemination_page.py. When edit_transfer_op_id is set, load ALL transfer rows for that operation_id (from transferencias or transferencias_externas) and pre-fill all lots in st.session_state['transfer_linhas'].
FIX (LOW): Streamlit sidebar theme color warnings - check .streamlit/config.toml or custom CSS for invalid/empty color values in widgetBackgroundColor, widgetBorderColor, skeletonBackgroundColor
critical_code_review_comments: BUG (HIGH): transfer_page.py grep confirms zero references to 'edit_transfer_op_id'. The variable is set by dashboard_page.py (line ~645) but never consumed. The insemination edit correctly uses edit_insemination_op_id to load all lots via JOIN on operation_id - transfer edit needs identical logic.

The multi-lot insemination (xangai-pedro, op_id=30745450, 3 lots, ids 2/3/4) has estoque_id=None for all rows. The insemination_page.py inner JOIN (line 146) will return 0 rows for this operation. Fallback (line 188) loads a DIFFERENT lot by garanhao+dono_id. Old records won't pre-fill correctly in edit mode.

registrar_inseminacao_linha() (app.py line 1246) is a legacy function that inserts WITHOUT operation_id - verify it is not called from any active flow, otherwise new records created via this path won't be grouped.

success_rate.frontend: 90% - all major flows work, 1 HIGH bug in transfer multi-lot edit

test_credentials.note: Login via keyboard Enter (click is intercepted)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Existing DB has: 6-lot external transfer (op_id=8ddc9755, Qtd 158), 3-lot insemination (op_id=30745450, egua=xangai-pedro), 2-lot external transfer (op_id=72ba7535, Qtd 46)
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is Streamlit at port 8501 with PostgreSQL on Render cloud. Login uses Enter key (not button click). Logs modal opens by clicking the ✏️ button at top-right of RECENT ACTIVITY section. To see modal content in Playwright, use main_frame = page.frames[0] (Streamlit runs in the first frame) then click via main_frame. Dashboard correctly groups 10 recent operations by operation_id. The 6-lot external transfer shows as 'Qtd 158 (6 lotes)'. Main bug to retest: transfer edit mode should pre-fill ALL lots when editing a grouped transfer - check if transfer_page.py now reads edit_transfer_op_id.

rca_of_the_issue.bug: Transfer edit mode doesn't load multi-lot operation
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: transfer_page.py only reads 'edit_transfer_id' (single row ID) and 'edit_transfer_type' from session state. It never reads 'edit_transfer_op_id' (UUID of the full operation). When dashboard_page.py sets edit_transfer_op_id and redirects to transfer page, the transfer page ignores it and pre-fills only the 1 row corresponding to action_id.
rca_of_the_issue.reproduction: 1. Login as admin/admin123. 2. Click ✏️ (Gerir logs) on dashboard. 3. Click the edit pencil on 'Transferência externa - Qtd 158 (6 lotes)'. 4. Transfer page opens in edit mode. 5. Only 1 lot pre-filled instead of all 6.
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: In transfer_page.py, add a block similar to insemination_page.py lines 135-186: check if edit_transfer_op_id is set in session state, then query all rows from transferencias_externas (or transferencias for internal) WHERE operation_id = edit_transfer_op_id, build transfer_linhas dict from all rows.
